data.name: Awaken: Hentai Dice
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD OUR GAMES TO YOUR WISHLIST 💖


關於此遊戲

魔法世界一直與我們的世界並存，卻遊離於秩序之外。許多年前，傳說中的微笑魔術師統一了這座城市，但在他消失前，留下了無數寶藏，而開啟寶藏的關鍵便是他的骰子。多年來，這件奇妙的神陷入了無主的狀態，但如今一切都不同了。

✨ 命運的指引，你成為了它的主人 ✨

在你祖父家發現這枚神秘的骰子后，你的生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。原來熟悉的城市中居然生活着怪物與魔法生物，魔法無處不在——只要你善於發現它們。擁有傳說中的微笑魔術師的骰子之後，你將捲入各類陰謀、爭鬥、戰鬥與尋寶旅程。當然了，真正的法師總不會缺少迷人女子的青睞。不過別忘了，城裡的一切並非表面看上去那般簡單，這些美女真的可靠嗎？

多樣的性愛場景無縫融入緊湊的劇情之中。贏得女巫、魔女和貓女的信任與好感。利用骰子的機制打敗對手，升級你的骰子並尋覓新的道具，變得更加強大。在戰鬥中積攢法力，關鍵時刻施放咒語。別忘了還有支線任務，最終的獎勵由你的選擇來決定。

敢不敢投身於這個充滿冒險、危險與慾望的奇幻世界？

⭐️ 12位各懷目的、背景和喜好的女孩

⭐️ 決定你的世界觀——是擁抱魔法，還是回歸熟悉的世界？

⭐️ 充滿幽默與戲劇的劇情

⭐️ 動態角色和情色場景

⭐️ 以骰子和咒語為基礎的有趣戰鬥系統

⭐️ 升級並收集獨特的骰子

⭐️ 來自城中或女孩們的支線任務

⭐️ 精美的視覺風格

data.short_description: 《覺醒：色慾魔骰》——充滿刺激的成人冒險！魔法無處不在，但不是人人都能掌握。深入城鎮的秘密，調查各種奇異事件，尋找傳說中的寶藏，在魔法世界中找到你的一席之地！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 德文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Awaken: Hentai Dice
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD OUR GAMES TO YOUR WISHLIST 💖


About the Game

The world of magic has been always close to our own, and there was no order in it. The Legenday Laughing Wizard has united the city many years ago, and before his disappearance hid innumerable treasures, the key to which was his dice. For a long time this wonderful artefact had no owner, but now everything has changed.

✨ By the Will of Fate, you become it's owner ✨

You couldn't even imagine how your life would change after you found some strange dice at your grandfather's house. Turns out the familiar City is inhabited by monsters and magical creatures, and magic is everywhere - you just have to be able to see it. After getting the dice of the Legendary Laughing Wizard, you will be drawn into intrigues and squabbles, battles and treasure hunts. And of course, a real wizard will never be left without the attention of charming women. Just don't forget that not everything in the City is what it seems, and can you really trust these beauties?

Numerous sex scenes are seamlessly integrated into a fast-paced plot. Win the trust and favor of sorceresses, demonesses and catgirls. Defeat your opponents using the dice mechanics. Upgrade your dice and find new ones to become stronger. Look for spells and save up mana in battle to use them at the right moment. Don't forget about the side quests. What reward awaits you at the end of this amazing adventure depends only on your choice.

Dare to dive into a fantasy world full of adventure, danger and desire!

⭐️ 12 girls with their own goals, history, and interests

⭐️ Determine your worldview - will you embrace magic or seek to return to the familiar world?

⭐️ A plot full of humor and drama

⭐️ Animated characters and sex scenes

⭐️ Interesting combat system based on dice and spells

⭐️ Upgrade and collect a unique set of dice

⭐️ Side quest in the City and from girls

⭐️ Beautiful visual style

data.short_description: Awaken: Hentai Dice - exciting adult adventure. Magic exists among us, but not everyone can achieve it. Delve into Town's mysteries, investigate bizarre incidents, find legendary treasure and take your place in a magic world!
data.supported_languages: English, Russian, French, German, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
